title: Worked Example - Comparing Three City Names

content.problemStatement:
In this example, we demonstrate how to use the strcmp() function to compare three different city names - "Delhi", "Dubai", and "Doha" based on lexicographical (dictionary) order. And displays the numeric result of the comparison.

**When executed, the code will show:**
```default
Comparison between 'Delhi' and 'Dubai': -16
Comparison between 'Dubai' and 'Doha': 6
Comparison between 'Delhi' and 'Doha': -10
```
